text.message: Still dont get why did u traded him city 1 for 1
No one else trading, and everyone asking me for 2:1. So I have no choice.
Of course i rather trade you/red
You are a city ahead of me
Need 2 to trade or i never catch up
If u are not planing to win
but if you don't want, and black offers me 2:1
Otherwise i have 0 chance of winning
Because he wins on his turn
I am happy that i gave 0 trades to him
Look at me I'm at 3 pts
I lost 20 minuts of my life because u cant count 3 ores and 2 wheats
it wasn't a good trade for me to give you 2:1
